allow:
Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: remove Bulma CSS framework to improve build performance

- Remove Bulma dependency from package.json
- Remove Bulma alias from vite.config.ts
- Replace bulma.$variable references with direct HSL values in index.scss
- Fix malformed SCSS variable declarations

Build time improved from ~28-30 seconds to ~2 seconds \(~14x speedup\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(navbar\): restore proper styling after Bulma removal

- Add comprehensive navbar layout styles \(flexbox, alignment\)
- Add button styles with proper borders and colors
- Add form control styles \(select, field, control\)
- Add responsive styles for mobile menu
- Add utility classes \(is-hidden, has-text-*, etc.\)
- Add proper font family declarations

Layout now matches original Bulma design without the dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore\(gitignore\): add .claude/ directory

Ignore Claude Code settings directory to prevent tracking
user-specific configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: cleanup test files and improve gitignore

- Remove performance test file \(created during investigation\)
- Remove useless comment from main.tsx
- Add dist/ to gitignore \(build output should not be tracked\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
